# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder:14b)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: web-server
  namespace: web-namespace
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web
  port: 80

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-web-to-db
  namespace: web-namespace
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: ""
    kind: Service
    name: db-service
    namespace: db-namespace
  serverNames:
  - web-server.web-namespace.svc.cluster.local
  rules:
  - from:
    - sourceNamespaces:
      - web-namespace
    toOperations:
    - "GET"
    - "POST"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-web-to-cache
  namespace: web-namespace
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: ""
    kind: Service
    name: cache-service
    namespace: cache-namespace
  serverNames:
  - web-server.web-namespace.svc.cluster.local
  rules:
  - from:
    - sourceNamespaces:
      - web-namespace
    toOperations:
    - "GET"
    - "POST"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: db-server
  namespace: db-namespace
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: db
  port: 5432

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-db-to-web
  namespace: db-namespace
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: ""
    kind: Service
    name: web-service
    namespace: web-namespace
  serverNames:
  - db-server.db-namespace.svc.cluster.local
  rules:
  - from:
    - sourceNamespaces:
      - db-namespace
    toOperations:
    - "GET"
    - "POST"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-db-to-cache
  namespace: db-namespace
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: ""
    kind: Service
    name: cache-service
    namespace: cache-namespace
  serverNames:
  - db-server.db-namespace.svc.cluster.local
  rules:
  - from:
    - sourceNamespaces:
      - db-namespace
    toOperations:
    - "GET"
    - "POST"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: cache-server
  namespace: cache-namespace
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: cache
  port: 6379

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-cache-to-web
  namespace: cache-namespace
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: ""
    kind: Service
    name: web-service
    namespace: web-namespace
  serverNames:
  - cache-server.cache-namespace.svc.cluster.local
  rules:
  - from:
    - sourceNamespaces:
      - cache-namespace
    toOperations:
    - "GET"
    - "POST"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-cache-to-db
  namespace: cache-namespace
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: ""
    kind: Service
    name: db-service
    namespace: db-namespace
  serverNames:
  - cache-server.cache-namespace.svc.cluster.local
  rules:
  - from:
    - sourceNamespaces:
      - cache-namespace
    toOperations:
    - "GET"
    - "POST"
